input_path.description: Path to the input CSV dataset file (required). Used when processing a single file directly.

quantization_bits.description: Quantization coefficient in bits per feature value (1-8). Higher values = more precision but larger file size.

model_name.description: Model name for output filenames. If empty or `auto`, extracted from input filename.

header.description: CSV header handling: 'auto' = detect automatically, 'yes' = skip first line, 'no' = process all lines.

problem_type.description: Problem mode for processing logic. Use 'isolation' for unlabeled anomaly-detection datasets.

remove_outliers.description: Apply Z-score outlier clipping during preprocessing. true = adapts to gradually changing data streams (removes outliers), false = adapts to suddenly fluctuating data streams (keeps all variations).
